subject: [CDS] Version bump

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> 
> "requestStatus":{"requestState":"FAILED","statusMessage":"STATUS: Error Source: UNKNOWN, Error Message: Exception in org.onap.so.client.cds.AbstractCDSProcessingBBUtils.sendRequestToCDSClientBB CDS call failed with status: Exception and errorMessage: null FLOW STATUS: ControllerExecutionBB has failed. TASK INFORMATION: Task name is null.","percentProgress":100,"timestamp":"Thu, 26 Aug 2021 03:48:58 GMT"}}}
> 
> @Dan
> I believe there may be sth wrong with this review as SO macroflow is failing with the above error that mentions CDS

I don't know if you caught Lukasz' comment above, but this change needs to go together with this SO change : https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/123386

The problem is that there was a breaking interface change inadvertantly committed earlier ... SO submitted a change to use that new version of the interface, but policy did not.  This change backs out that breaking change, to fix the issue with policy - but it means that SO has to back out their change as well, which is what that SO change above does

This change backs out that breaking change, to fix the issue with policy - but it means that SO has to back out their change as well, which is what that SO change above does

Correction ... the SO change does more than back out that change .. it is more correct to say that the Istanbul version of SO is compatible with this version of the CDS interface.  @Lukasz - please confirm

Patch Set 2:

Hi Dan,

As we discussed yesterday this change should be squashed with the SO change above into a single commit.
Would you mind to do it so that I can merge this?
SO change just got a fully green gating to after this "technical" change we should be good to go
